sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: Boxing Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player assumes role of George Foreman with ability to block opponent punches, evade in two different directions, and throw variety of punches. Limited movement in ring criticized by reviewers.

physics_values.notes: Super Play reviewer noted 'inability to move in the ring' and 'limited movement from the main character'

special_mechanics.name: Knockdown Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Knockout requires knocking opponent down 4 times in 3-round match. Technical knockout awarded if opponent knocked down 3 times in single round.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Sports title with no documented physics parameters in available sources. Wikipedia source focuses on gameplay rules (knockdowns, match structure) rather than movement/physics values. Contemporary reviews noted 'jerky animation' and severely limited character movement, but no technical specifications provided. Game designed for boxing simulation rather than platforming, making traditional movement parameters largely irrelevant.
sources_used: Wikipedia - George Foreman's KO Boxing (gameplay section, reception section with contemporary reviews)
